trigger: When preventing unsupported opencode coverage from being reported as complete

native_entry.projection_rule: Use only as a pointer to skills/software-project-governance/SKILL.md; do not duplicate workflow rules.

runtime_e2e.evidence: Local opencode command returned version 1.15.5; provider/model preflight passed with supported DeepSeek models; real target-cwd opencode runtime E2E passed in the 90s timeout window.

target_cwd_e2e.evidence: Executed from project/e2e-test-project cwd and returned Test Project status with default-confirm permission mode.

provider_model_preflight.evidence: Preflight verified opencode CLI PATH/version and a supported DeepSeek model configuration without recording API key values.
provider_model_preflight.remediation: Use deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash; remove invalid suffixes such as deepseek-v4-pro[1m] and ANSI escape residue.

agent_runtime_e2e.command: python skills/software-project-governance/infra/verify_workflow.py agent-runtime-e2e --agent opencode --timeout 90; opencode run --dir . --format json ...
agent_runtime_e2e.evidence: Real opencode target-cwd E2E passed: opencode read project/e2e-test-project/.governance/plan-tracker.md and returned E2E_PLATFORM=opencode; E2E_AGENT=Coordinator; E2E_MODE=always-on x default-confirm.
